TypeMapWriteRule.description: A write rule: `canonical` matches, `native` renders (free-form DDL).
TypeMapWriteRule.title: TypeMapWriteRule

description: Public JSON Schema contract for a database connector's `type-map-write.json` — the write direction (canonical → native DDL) of its type-map pair, a top-level array of `{match, native, canonical}` rules where `canonical` matches and `native` renders. The full per-rule contract lives in the model and is enforced by the connector validator; this published schema is the structural projection. Source of truth: analitiq.contracts.type_map.TypeMapWriteDoc (Pydantic).
title: Analitiq Type Map (write)
